hooks.command: echo '[Hook] Writing Python file: checking for hardcoded secrets...' && grep -n 'sk-\|api_key\s*=\s*["'"'"']' "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_PATH" 2>/dev/null && echo 'WARNING: Possible hardcoded secret detected!' || true
cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && python -m py_compile "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_PATH" 2>&1 && echo '[OK] Python syntax valid' || echo '[WARN] Python syntax error in $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_PATH'
echo '[Session End] Remind: commit changes with git add -A && git commit -m "feat: <description>"'
